tracks.rawText: 2:53☕ Canción_ “Café del Alma” – dedicada aUploadContemporary Latin Pop with a strong Vallenato influence, The arrangement features a prominent diatonic accordion playing melodic counterpoints and rhythmic syncopations, An acoustic guitar provides steady strumming in a 4/4 meter at 125 BPM in the key of G Major, The percussion section consists of a caja vallenata, guacharaca providing a consistent scraping texture, and a modern kick drum emphasizing the downbeats, A clean electric bass follows the chord progressions with a melodic, walking feel, Lead male vocals are clear and centered, supported by harmonized backing vocals during the chorus, A brief instrumental bridge features an accordion solo with rapid trills and bellows shakes over a steady rhythmic bed3PublishRemix
tracks.title: ☕ Canción_ “Café del Alma” – dedicada a

tracks.rawText: 2:26ChainsUploadIndie rock with soul influences, A clean electric guitar plays a syncopated, rhythmic riff using double-stops and muted strums, The bass guitar follows the kick drum with a melodic, walking line, Drums feature a tight, dry snare and a steady eighth-note hi-hat pattern, A baritone male vocal delivers soulful, slightly gritty melodies, The arrangement includes a layered vocal chorus with harmonized backing vocals, A bridge section features a clean electric guitar solo with bluesy bends and pentatonic runs, Tempo is 92 BPM in the key of G minor1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Chains

tracks.rawText: 3:39“Light Upon the River” (2)UploadReggae-fusion track with a blend of roots reggae and modern synth-pop elements, Features a prominent syncopated electric bassline, a steady one-drop drum pattern with a crisp snare rimshot, and rhythmic electric guitar skanks, Atmospheric analog synthesizers provide melodic layers and spatial reverb effects, Male vocals alternate between Spanish and English, utilizing both melodic singing and rhythmic toasting styles, The arrangement includes a bright, brass-like synth lead and occasional dub-style delay on vocal tails, 85 BPM, 4/4 time signature, Key of G Major3PublishRemix
tracks.title: “Light Upon the River” (2)

tracks.rawText: 3:56My soulUploadIndie pop with cinematic orchestral elements, Features a prominent upright piano playing syncopated chords, a driving drum kit with a crisp snare and active hi-hats, and a melodic electric bass, A string section provides staccato rhythmic backing and legato swells, Clean electric guitar adds rhythmic accents, Female vocals are clear and expressive, ranging from breathy lower register to powerful belted choruses, Tempo is 120 BPM in 4/4 time, key of G minor6PublishRemix
tracks.title: My soul

tracks.rawText: 3:25🌺 “Venus Vibez” 🌺UploadReggaeton with Latin pop influences, The track features a syncopated dembow drum pattern with a prominent kick and crisp snare, A bright, plucked acoustic guitar plays rhythmic chords and melodic fills, A deep, melodic sub-bass follows the chord progression, Atmospheric synth pads and occasional filtered sweeps provide harmonic depth, Male vocals are processed with subtle pitch correction and light reverb, The arrangement includes rhythmic vocal chops and percussive accents, 95 BPM, G Major, 4/4 time signature3PublishRemix
tracks.title: 🌺 “Venus Vibez” 🌺

tracks.rawText: 3:40elisa (1)UploadLatin pop track with a driving reggaeton-influenced beat, The arrangement features a prominent acoustic guitar playing syncopated rhythmic patterns and melodic fills, A deep, rounded synth bass follows the kick drum pattern, Percussion consists of a crisp snare on the 2 and 4 with a characteristic dembow kick pattern, Bright, clean electric guitar layers provide additional rhythmic texture in the choruses, Female vocals are centered and dry with light plate reverb, The track is in the key of G# minor at 95 BPM in 4/4 time3PublishRemix
tracks.title: elisa (1)

tracks.rawText: 4:34Purple Ocean Cat (Remix)UploadHardstyle at 150 BPM in G# minor, The track features a distorted, pitched hardstyle kick with a long, resonant sub-bass tail that follows the melodic progression, A bright, detuned supersaw lead plays a syncopated, anthemic melody characterized by rapid 16th-note gates and wide stereo imaging, Percussion includes sharp, metallic claps on the backbeat and high-frequency 16th-note closed hi-hats, A secondary, plucky square-wave synth provides rhythmic counterpoint during the breakdown, The arrangement utilizes long white noise sweeps, rising pitch-shifted synth effects, and sudden rhythmic silences for tension, The mix is heavily compressed with a sidechain trigger on the kick to duck the lead synths and pads3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Purple Ocean Cat (Remix)

tracks.rawText: 2:50Falling Like Fire (3)UploadIndie pop rock track with a prominent brass section and driving rhythmic energy, The arrangement features a clean, rhythmic electric guitar playing syncopated chords, a punchy bass guitar following the kick drum patterns, and a full drum kit with a crisp snare and active hi-hat work, A bright brass section consisting of trumpets and saxophones provides melodic stabs and a lead hook during the instrumental breaks, Male vocals are delivered with a clear, energetic tone, occasionally layering into harmonies during the chorus, The tempo is 128 BPM in the key of G major, The production is clean with moderate compression on the drums and a light room reverb on the brass and vocals6PublishRemix
tracks.title: Falling Like Fire (3)

tracks.rawText: 3:48Rise of the Serpent (Remix) (Edit) (1)UploadElectroswing track featuring a prominent brass section with trumpets and trombones performing syncopated staccato stabs, A walking upright bass line provides the harmonic foundation alongside a four-on-the-floor kick drum and crisp hi-hats, A clean electric guitar plays rhythmic jazz chords on the off-beats, The arrangement includes a melodic accordion lead and a bluesy harmonica solo characterized by rapid trills and pitch bends, Female vocals are processed with a vintage radio filter, delivering rhythmic, staccato lines, The tempo is 124 BPM in the key of G minor2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Rise of the Serpent (Remix) (Edit) (1)

tracks.rawText: 3:39stoned (Mastered with Clear Sky at 63pct)UploadReggae with a fusion of Latin and roots elements, The arrangement features a syncopated electric bass line, a clean-toned electric guitar playing offbeat skank chords, and a drum kit with a prominent rimshot on the third beat, A bright, melodic brass section consisting of trumpet and saxophone provides staccato interjections and melodic flourishes, The track includes both male and female vocals, often in harmony, A subtle organ provides sustained bubble patterns in the background, The tempo is 145 BPM in the key of G major2PublishRemix
tracks.title: stoned (Mastered with Clear Sky at 63pct)

tracks.rawText: 4:31Fire (Remix)UploadContemporary pop with electronic and R&B influences, A clean, palm-muted electric guitar plays a syncopated eighth-note riff, The bass is a deep, rounded synth sub that follows the kick drum pattern, Percussion consists of a crisp snare on the backbeat, a tight electronic kick, and sixteenth-note hi-hats, Atmospheric synth pads provide harmonic wash in the background, The lead vocal is a soulful tenor with light pitch correction and moderate reverb, During the chorus, layered vocal harmonies and a bright, plucked synth melody are added, The track is in the key of B minor at 105 BPM4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Fire (Remix)
